unitName: 選擇適合你的寵物 | Choose the right pet for you

article.title: Choose the right pet for you 選擇適合你的寵物

paragraphs.english: There are about 470 million pet dogs and 370 million pet cats worldwide! But which pet is right for you? Take this quiz to find out!
sentences: There are about 470 million pet dogs and 370 million pet cats worldwide!
But which pet is right for you? Take this quiz to find out!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 全球約有4.7億隻寵物狗和3.7億隻寵物貓！但哪種寵物適合你呢？做做看這個測驗吧！
translation_sentences: 🌐 全球約有4.7億隻寵物狗和3.7億隻寵物貓！
但哪種寵物適合你呢？做做看這個測驗吧！

implication.english: 💡 The introduction presents interesting pet population facts and introduces the pet selection quiz.
implication.chinese: 💡 開頭介紹有趣的寵物數量統計，並引出寵物選擇測驗。[換句話說]：全世界有好多寵物，但你知道哪種寵物最適合你嗎？來玩個測驗就知道！

paragraphs.english: Question 1: How much space do you have in your home? A) I don't have much space at home. B) I have some space at home. C) I have a lot of space at home.
sentences: Question 1: How much space do you have in your home?
A) I don't have much space at home.
B) I have some space at home.
C) I have a lot of space at home.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 問題1：你家裡有多少空間？A) 我家空間不多。B) 我家有一些空間。C) 我家有很多空間。
translation_sentences: 🌐 問題1：你家裡有多少空間？
A) 我家空間不多。
B) 我家有一些空間。
C) 我家有很多空間。

implication.english: 💡 The first question asks about available space at home, which helps determine suitable pet size.
implication.chinese: 💡 第一個問題詢問家裡的空間大小，這有助於決定適合的寵物體型。[換句話說]：養寵物前要先想想家裡夠不夠大。

paragraphs.english: Question 2: How do you feel about outdoor exercise? A) I don't exercise outdoors very often. B) I like going for a run sometimes. C) I love exercising outdoors every day.
sentences: Question 2: How do you feel about outdoor exercise?
A) I don't exercise outdoors very often.
B) I like going for a run sometimes.
C) I love exercising outdoors every day.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 問題2：你對戶外運動的感覺如何？A) 我不太常在戶外運動。B) 我有時候喜歡跑步。C) 我每天都喜歡在戶外運動。
translation_sentences: 🌐 問題2：你對戶外運動的感覺如何？
A) 我不太常在戶外運動。
B) 我有時候喜歡跑步。
C) 我每天都喜歡在戶外運動。

implication.english: 💡 The second question assesses the owner's exercise habits, which is important for high-energy pets.
implication.chinese: 💡 第二個問題評估主人的運動習慣，這對需要大量運動的寵物很重要。[換句話說]：你喜歡運動嗎？這會影響你適不適合養狗喔。

paragraphs.english: Question 3: How much work do you want to do for your pet? A) Almost none. B) Some, but not too much. C) There is no limit!
sentences: Question 3: How much work do you want to do for your pet?
A) Almost none.
B) Some, but not too much.
C) There is no limit!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 問題3：你願意為寵物付出多少心力？A) 幾乎不。B) 一些，但不要太多。C) 沒有限度！
translation_sentences: 🌐 問題3：你願意為寵物付出多少心力？
A) 幾乎不。
B) 一些，但不要太多。
C) 沒有限度！

implication.english: 💡 The third question asks about the owner's willingness to care for a pet, from low to high commitment.
implication.chinese: 💡 第三個問題詢問主人照顧寵物的意願，從低到高的承諾程度。[換句話說]：你願意花多少時間精力照顧寵物？

paragraphs.english: Question 4: How noisy do you want your pet to be? A) I want a quiet pet. B) I don't mind a noisy pet. C) I want a pet that can be quiet when I want it to.
sentences: Question 4: How noisy do you want your pet to be?
A) I want a quiet pet.
B) I don't mind a noisy pet.
C) I want a pet that can be quiet when I want it to.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 問題4：你希望你的寵物多吵？A) 我想要安靜的寵物。B) 我不介意吵鬧的寵物。C) 我想要一個在我需要時能安靜的寵物。
translation_sentences: 🌐 問題4：你希望你的寵物多吵？
A) 我想要安靜的寵物。
B) 我不介意吵鬧的寵物。
C) 我想要一個在我需要時能安靜的寵物。

implication.english: 💡 The fourth question asks about noise tolerance, which helps match with quiet or vocal pets.
implication.chinese: 💡 第四個問題詢問對噪音的容忍度，有助於匹配安靜或愛叫的寵物。[換句話說]：你能接受寵物吵鬧嗎？

paragraphs.english: Question 5: What do you most want to do with your pet? A) I want to look at my pet from a distance. B) I want to talk to my pet. C) I want to hug and play with my pet.
sentences: Question 5: What do you most want to do with your pet?
A) I want to look at my pet from a distance.
B) I want to talk to my pet.
C) I want to hug and play with my pet.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 問題5：你最想和寵物做什麼？A) 我想從遠處看著我的寵物。B) 我想和我的寵物說話。C) 我想擁抱和玩耍我的寵物。
translation_sentences: 🌐 問題5：你最想和寵物做什麼？
A) 我想從遠處看著我的寵物。
B) 我想和我的寵物說話。
C) 我想擁抱和玩耍我的寵物。

implication.english: 💡 The fifth question asks about desired interaction level with pets, from observation to physical contact.
implication.chinese: 💡 第五個問題詢問期望與寵物的互動程度，從觀察到肢體接觸。[換句話說]：你希望和寵物有多親近？

paragraphs.english: Mostly As: A fish! Fish are quiet—you probably will not hear them at all! They also do not take up much room. But they are still very interesting and beautiful pets!
sentences: Mostly As: A fish!
Fish are quiet—you probably will not hear them at all!
They also do not take up much room.
But they are still very interesting and beautiful pets!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 大多是A：魚！魚很安靜——你可能完全聽不到牠們的聲音！牠們也不佔太多空間。但牠們仍然是非常有趣又漂亮的寵物！
translation_sentences: 🌐 大多是A：魚！
魚很安靜——你可能完全聽不到牠們的聲音！
牠們也不佔太多空間。
但牠們仍然是非常有趣又漂亮的寵物！

implication.english: 💡 If you chose mostly A answers, a fish is the recommended pet for you.
implication.chinese: 💡 如果你大多選A，魚類是推薦給你的寵物。[換句話說]：你適合養魚，安靜不佔空間，又可以欣賞牠們的美。

paragraphs.english: Mostly Bs: A bird! Birds are noisy and fun. You can chat with them and let them fly around your house, but you do not have to spend all day taking care of them.
sentences: Mostly Bs: A bird!
Birds are noisy and fun.
You can chat with them and let them fly around your house, but you do not have to spend all day taking care of them.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 大多是B：鳥！鳥兒吵鬧又有趣。你可以和牠們聊天，讓牠們在家裡飛，但不需要整天照顧牠們。
translation_sentences: 🌐 大多是B：鳥！
鳥兒吵鬧又有趣。
你可以和牠們聊天，讓牠們在家裡飛，但不需要整天照顧牠們。

implication.english: 💡 If you chose mostly B answers, a bird is the recommended pet for you.
implication.chinese: 💡 如果你大多選B，鳥類是推薦給你的寵物。[換句話說]：你適合養鳥，可以跟牠說話，又不會太麻煩。

paragraphs.english: Mostly Cs: A dog! Dogs are cuddly and loving. They need plenty of exercise and require a lot of work from you. But if you are up for the challenge, they are wonderful pets!
sentences: Mostly Cs: A dog!
Dogs are cuddly and loving.
They need plenty of exercise and require a lot of work from you.
But if you are up for the challenge, they are wonderful pets!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 大多是C：狗！狗狗柔軟可愛又充滿愛心。牠們需要大量運動，也需要你付出很多心力。但如果你準備好接受挑戰，牠們是很棒的寵物！
translation_sentences: 🌐 大多是C：狗！
狗狗柔軟可愛又充滿愛心。
牠們需要大量運動，也需要你付出很多心力。
但如果你準備好接受挑戰，牠們是很棒的寵物！

implication.english: 💡 If you chose mostly C answers, a dog is the recommended pet for you.
implication.chinese: 💡 如果你大多選C，狗狗是推薦給你的寵物。[換句話說]：你適合養狗，雖然需要花很多時間照顧，但牠們會給你滿滿的愛。
